data.title: Cardano touches $0.43 again, but can ADA breakout this time?
data.description:
Cardano price consolidates in the $0. 43 region after double-digit gains in 24 hours. ADA is near the middle point of a key downtrend channel. With potential tailwinds in the offing, can ADA price see another leg up? Cardano (ADA) remains the ninth-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalisation, with bulls keeping the token anchored above $0
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/cardano-touches-0-43-again-but-can-ada-breakout-this-time/

data.title: Coinbase Warns Bitcoin Under Pressure, Citing ETF Outflows and Whales Exit
data.description:
Coinbase Institutional identifies mounting bearish pressure on Bitcoin as spot ETF outflows reach record levels, early whales liquidate billion-dollar positions, and digital asset treasury valuations fall below net asset value.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-warns-bitcoin-under-pressure-citing-etf-outflows-and-whales-exit/

data.title: Rep. Steil Demands Regulators Fast-Track GENIUS Act as Stablecoin Law Deadline Looms
data.description:
As Rep. Steil presses agencies to move faster on GENIUS Act rules, NCUA Chair Kyle Hauptman maintains they are committed to delivering the final framework by the July 2026 deadline.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/steil-presses-regulators-genius-act-deadline/

data.title: Why is Crypto Market Up Today? All You Need To Know
data.description:
Key Insights The crypto market moved higher today as Bitcoin gained fresh demand in the United States. Notably, the market rebound is connected to lates move by Vanguard, allowingclients to buy Bitcoin ETF again.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/12/03/why-is-crypto-market-up-today-all-you-need-to-know/

data.title: Bitcoin market fears are overblown as policy shifts open medium-term upside, K33 says

data.title: SEC Blocks High-Leverage ETF Launches Over Risk Concerns
data.description:
The SEC halts reviews of high-leverage ETF applications, citing excessive risk exposure and directing issuers to revise or withdraw proposals.
source: https://coincu.com/news/sec-blocks-high-leverage-etf-launches/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin’s Outlines Network Scaling Expectations for Ethereum
data.description:
Buterin has outlined what he sees as the network’s next phase of scaling, offering a more nuanced roadmap for growth as on-chain activity accelerates.
source: https://zycrypto.com/vitalik-buterins-outlines-network-scaling-expectations-for-ethereum/

data.title: iShares Bitcoin ETP Expands with New Securities Issuance
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, iShares Digital Assets AG has issued 730,000 new securities for its iShares Bitcoin ETP, bringing the total number of securities in the series to 76,595,000. This marks the 31st issuance in the series. The new securities are set to begin trading on the London Stock Exchange's main board on December 4, priced at $9.04 each. The Bitcoin exchange-traded product tracks the performance of Bitcoin and carries an annual fee rate of 0.25%. However, a discounted fee rate of 0.15% will be applied until December 31, 2026.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Highlights Impact of Regulatory Reforms on Banking
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent has stated that the regulatory reforms implemented by U.S. President Donald Trump's administration are expected to unlock an additional $2.5 trillion in lending capacity for banks. Besent emphasized that during economic downturns, reliance on private credit tends to be pro-cyclical. The growth in private credit is attributed to the stringent regulations imposed on the banking system.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 3,100 USDT with a 8.96% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 03, 2025, 14:41 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 3,100 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 3,114.929932 USDT, with a narrowed 8.96% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Grayscale Chainlink Trust ETF Sees Strong Inflows on Debut
data.description: According to Odaily, Grayscale CEO Peter Mintzberg announced on the X platform that the Grayscale Chainlink Trust ETF experienced approximately $41.5 million in inflows on its first day of trading. This performance positions it as one of the better-performing ETFs in its category, indicating a continued market demand for investment exposure to LINK.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent Optimistic About Economic Outlook Despite Weakness
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent has noted signs of weakness in certain sectors of the economy, suggesting that interest rate cuts may be necessary. Despite these challenges, Besent remains very optimistic about the economic prospects for next year, highlighting an increase in capital expenditure.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs See Significant Inflows While Ethereum ETFs Experience Outflows
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, monitoring data from Lookonchain reveals notable movements in cryptocurrency ETFs. As of the time of reporting, ten Bitcoin ETFs have seen a net inflow of 2,411 BTC. In contrast, nine Ethereum ETFs have experienced a net outflow of 36,108 ETH. Additionally, SOL ETFs have recorded a net inflow of 280,620 SOL.

data.description:
CME Group introduced a variety of benchmarks aimed at providing standardized volatility and pricing data.

data.title: Will Saylor’s Strategy Sell its Bitcoin Stash As Prices Fall? Here’s What Experts Are Saying
data.description:
Strategy (MSTR) is under scrutiny as Bitcoin’s slide fuels speculation that the company may eventually need to liquidate part of its massive BTC holdings.
source: https://zycrypto.com/will-saylors-strategy-sell-its-bitcoin-stash-as-prices-fall-heres-what-experts-are-saying/

data.title: U.S. Tariffs Under Trump Become Standard, Says Treasury Secretary
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent stated that U.S. President Donald Trump has normalized tariffs ranging from 15% to 20%.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Comments on Supreme Court's Tariff Decision
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent expressed optimism regarding the Supreme Court's decision on tariffs. He stated that tariffs should not be considered a form of taxation and emphasized the need for careful deliberation by the Supreme Court when overturning U.S. President Donald Trump's tariffs under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act.

data.title: US Pentagon loans Trump-backed rare earths company another $620 million
data.description:
Vulcan Elements, a rare earths start-up with only 30 employees, has secured a massive $620 million loan from the U. S. Department of War, just three months after 1789 Capital, the venture capital firm where Donald Trump Jr is a partner, invested in the company. The funding forms part of a larger $1. 4 billion package aimed […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-rare-earths-company-pentagon-620m/
